name: The Linda Lindas
description:
'''The Linda Lindas''' is an American [[punk rock|punk]] band from Los Angeles. The group comprises Bela Salazar, Eloise Wong, and sisters Lucia and Mila de la Garza.

The band formed in 2018, and took their name from the film ''[[Linda Linda Linda]]'', which in turn takes its name from the [[The Blue Hearts|Blue Hearts]] song "[[Linda Linda]]". After being noticed by comedian [[Amy Poehler]], they recorded the soundtrack for her film [[Moxie (film)|''Moxie'']], which was released in 2021. Later that year, they released the single "[[Racist, Sexist Boy]]", which went viral. [[Epitaph Records]] signed them shortly afterwards.

In 2022, they released their debut album, ''[[Growing Up (The Linda Lindas album)|Growing Up]]'', and received mostly positive reviews.
